app.title: The Library
app.subtitle: A solo roleplaying game
app.meta_description: Explore your character's memories through books found in a mental library.

start.intro: Between dusty shelves and candlelight, the pages of your past await. Do you dare open the first book?

prologue.title: Prologue
prologue.subtitle: The threshold of the library. The character takes shape, the world comes alive.
prologue.name_placeholder: The name that will echo through these pages...
prologue.desc_placeholder: Who you are, how you look, what you carry...
prologue.attributes_help: Each attribute starts at 1. Your background and support will increase throughout the game.
prologue.first_page_help: Write your first journal entry. How did you arrive at the library? What do you seek among its shelves?

chapter.title: Chapter {roman}
chapter.subtitle: A volume awaits on the shelves. Its pages hold lost memories.
chapter.pre_journal_help: What event unfolds before you? Describe what the book's pages evoke in your memory.
chapter.pre_journal_placeholder: The pages reveal a forgotten memory...
chapter.roll_help: Choose an attribute and roll the dice. Each attribute can only be used once across chapters.
chapter.post_journal_help: How was the event resolved? Describe the outcome based on the dice result.

epilogue.title: Epilogue
epilogue.subtitle: Memories converge. The past demands to be faced.
epilogue.pre_journal_help: You have discovered the final book. What ultimate challenge lies before you? Describe what the pages evoke before facing your actions.
epilogue.pre_journal_placeholder: The epilogue pages reveal a challenge that demands everything from you...
epilogue.action_choose_attr: Choose an attribute for this action:
epilogue.support_help: You may add the Support value of an attribute to this roll. Only available once during the entire epilogue.
epilogue.support_used: Support has already been used in this epilogue.
epilogue.post_roll_help: Describe how you used your attributes to try to overcome the obstacle and the result of your actions.
epilogue.post_roll_placeholder: With determination, you try to overcome what fate has placed before you...
epilogue.final_help: The sum of your actions faces destiny. Your accumulated score against 2d10.
epilogue.post_final_help: The final chapter of your story. What have you discovered? What have you left behind?
epilogue.post_final_placeholder: The pen writes the last words of this story...

completed.title: Story Completed
completed.subtitle: The pages have closed. The story is etched into the library.
completed.confirm_new_game: Start a new game? The current game will be lost.

outcome_explanation.chapter_hit: Full success. Your Background increases by 1.
outcome_explanation.chapter_weak_hit: Partial success. Your Support increases by 1.
outcome_explanation.epilogue_hit: Full success. You gain 2 overcome points.
outcome_explanation.epilogue_weak_hit: Partial success. You gain 1 overcome point.
outcome_explanation.epilogue_miss: Failure. You gain no overcome points from this action.
outcome_explanation.final_hit: Your score surpassed both fate dice. The story ends in triumph.
outcome_explanation.final_weak_hit: You surpassed one of the dice. The story concludes in shades of grey.
outcome_explanation.final_miss: Fate was stronger. The story ends in defeat.

journal.title: Journal
journal.empty_prompt: The pages await to be written...
journal.write_before_continue: Write in the journal before continuing.

modal.exit_text: Your progress is saved automatically with each action.

errors.choose_genre: Choose a genre for your story.
errors.choose_epoch: Choose an epoch for your story.
errors.need_description: Add a description for your character.
errors.need_journal: Write in the journal before continuing.
